message:
refactor(robot): snapshot-backed markdown and terse output surfaces

Rewrite PrintMarkdown and GetTerse to derive all data from shared
SnapshotOutput projection instead of making live calls to tmux, bv,
agentmail, and alerts independently.

Markdown changes:
- Call GetSnapshot() first, pass to renderMarkdownFromSnapshot()
- Section names: sessions,beads,alerts,mail → summary,sessions,work,alerts,attention
- Registry-backed resolveMarkdownSections() validates/orders sections
- New summary section renders dashboard table
- "Beads" renamed to "Work" consuming adapters.WorkSection/WorkItem
- Mail section removed (absorbed into snapshot summary counts)
- New "Attention" section renders attention feed items

Terse changes:
- Call GetSnapshot() once, buildTerseOutputFromSnapshot() derives all state
- Eliminate per-session tmux pane capture and direct bv/alerts/mail queries
- Agent counting via snapshotSessionCounts() on SnapshotAgent string fields

157 lines of new tests covering terse/markdown from snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
